query: Eng3 Corporation NanoVi founder leadership Seattle revenue financing origin story
answer: Eng3 Corporation was founded in 2003 by Berlin‑born engineer Hans Eng, whose 25‑plus years in medical‑device R&D—including a stint at Johnson & Johnson Europe and the creation and sale of a German implant firm—provided the scientific foundation for the company’s patented NanoVi technology that targets protein folding and oxidative‑stress repair (https://eng3corp.com/about-eng3-corp/).  Headquartered at 2234 Eastlake Ave E in Seattle, Washington, the firm’s leadership team now includes Eng as chief executive officer and Rowena Gates, a Vancouver native who co‑founded Aviarc and now serves as principal and vice‑president of business development (same source).  Although Eng3 is a privately held medical‑device company and does not disclose detailed revenue figures, its public communications focus on product launches (NanoVi Eco, Pro and Exo) and market expansion rather than financing rounds, suggesting that growth has been funded through private investment and sales of its devices rather than public equity (e.g., press release announcing the NanoVi Exo in 2019 – https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2019/05/09/1821038/0/en/Eng3-Corporation-Announces-New-NanoVi-Exo-Patented-Desktop-Device-Proven-to-Help-Repair-Everyday-Cell-Damage.html and CB Insights profile – https://www.cbinsights.com/company/eng3).  The origin story therefore combines Eng’s material‑science expertise, a pivot from earlier “activated‑air” devices to biophysical NanoVi systems, and a Seattle‑based manufacturing base that supports a niche market of biohackers, high‑performance athletes and wellness centers.

# The Story Behind

![Image 5](https://eng3corp.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/nanovi-eng3-banner-logo.png)

![Image 6](https://eng3corp.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/about-nanovi-machine.png)

## About Eng3 Corporation

 Founded in 2003 by engineer Hans Eng, Eng3 Corporation creates scientifically validated technology specifically designed to promote cellular activities and improve protein functions through the repair and protection of protein structures. 

 Eng3 is the first medical device company to address the problem of oxidative stress and cell damage by focusing on protein structure and folding—both how to repair damage when it happens, and how to prevent or slow it. Its NanoVi family of devices—NanoVi Eco®, NanoVi Pro®, and NanoVi Exo®—were designed to use biophysics, not chemical substances, to provoke the body’s natural repair processes. 

## Our Mission to the Health Community

 Our mission is to leverage recent advances in biophysics and water science to improve the health and wellbeing of people all over the world. 

 We believe that it is better to help the body repair itself than to override its natural processes with substances or pharmaceuticals. 

![Image 7](https://eng3corp.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/podcastarticlewave.png)

## Meet Our Leaders

## Hans Eng

Founder and CEO

 Originally hailing from Berlin, Germany, Hans Eng is the founder and chief executive officer of Eng3 Corporation. He formed the company several years after moving to the United States. 

 An engineer by training, Hans has an extensive background in research and development, production, and quality assurance for medical devices. Hans’ 25+ years of experience with advanced medical technologies includes a stint at Johnson & Johnson in Europe and the formation, growth, and successful sale of a German medical implant company. 

 Hans leveraged his degree from the Technical University of Berlin and his background in material sciences and proteomics in the development of the proprietary technology underlying Eng3’s NanoVi® products, which reflect not only his expertise in medical technologies but also his passion for health and athletic performance. When he finds some spare time, Hans heads for the great outdoors for hiking, snowboarding, or snowshoeing. 

## Rowena Gates

VP Business Development

A native of Vancouver, Canada, Rowena Gates is a principal and the vice president of business development at Eng3 Corporation. She has worked with the company for more than 15 years, building relationships with clients in the health, wellness, and performance markets.

Like Hans, Rowena is a serial entrepreneur. Prior to joining Eng3, Rowena spent six years as founder and CEO of Aviarc Corporation, a leader in document chain management. Before Aviarc, she co-founded a document imaging company, now part of ImageSource. And prior to that, in 1995, she co-founded one of the earliest companies to offer an Internet-based solution to the logistics industry.

Rowena received a Doctorate from the University of Washington for her dissertation on the use of international strategic alliances by emerging high-tech companies. When she’s able to take time away from Eng3, she enjoys tennis, sailing, backpacking, and hiking or snowshoeing in the mountains near Seattle.

![Image 8](https://eng3corp.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/learnmoremachine-1024x842.png)

[Eng3 to Present at World Changers Summit](https://www.fintechnews.org/eng3-to-present-at-world-changers-summit/)
Jul 1, 2023

Fintech News July 1, 2023 Vatican Event at Pontifical Academy of Science Focused on Creation of a Better, Healthier and more Sustainable World SEATTLE–(BUSINESS WIRE)– Eng3 Corporation today announced that, Dr. Rowena Gates, co-founder and Vice President, will present NanoVi® technology at the prestigious World Changers Summit 2023 being held July 5th at the Pontifical Academy of Sciences in the Vatican City. The Summit is organized by the Institute for Advance Studies and Cooperation, whose mission is to foster groundbreaking intellectual and scientific exploration. Speakers and guests from many countries were invited by Dr. Gabriele Andreoli, IASC President, who organized and curated the event. Dustin Plantholt, “The Count of Monte Crypto” and World Changers Summit Board Member, will act as Master of Ceremonies. The World Changers Summit brings thought leaders in multiple disciplines together to share wisdom on how to move towards a healthier, more sustainable world. Speakers will present topics as diverse and interrelated as Artificial Intelligence, Evolutionary Biohacking, Decentralized Finance, Investment, the Metaverse, and Entrepreneurship. Rowena Gates, who started research into alliances as a business strategy in the 1980s, is inspired by the collaborative focus of the summit. “It is an honor to be invited to speak at the World Changers Summit. Dr. Gabriele Andreoli’s vision for cooperation mirrors my approach. He has a remarkable ability to bring people together, and I am grateful for the invitation to present NanoVi at the Pontifical Academy of Sciences in the Vatican City.” Rowena Gates will discuss how it is possible to help the body repair and perform better with the NanoVi device. This technology was embraced by the summit organizers because it fundamentally supports the body without overriding or disrupting its natural functions. She will introduce academic studies supporting the improvements in physical and cognitive performance and recovery from use of the NanoVi device. Dr. Gabriele Andreoli invited a presentation on NanoVi because it supports the whole system and is complementary to other health interventions. He included NanoVi in his book “Evolutionary Biohacking, the Rise of Regenerative A.I. Science,” which will be presented for the first time at the World Changers Summit. Dr. Andreoli explains why NanoVi fits so well with his agenda for sustainable health: “Proteins are the foundation of life, so having a technology that helps them work better is in full alignment with my vision for the future of health. Long-term sustainable health requires that we support the body without the potential for harm.” The NanoVi is a patented, desktop device proven to help restore the function of damaged proteins by influencing the water that surrounds them. Loss of protein function causes aging, a decline in performance and chronic illness. Accelerating cell repair strengthens the immune system, increases vitality and performance, and slows the aging process. To see an animated video of how NanoVi technology works, click here . NanoVi devices are used by biohackers and other health-conscious individuals, and people demanding high-performance including corporate executives and professional athletes (NFL, MLB, NHL, NBA). NanoVi has also been adopted by medical clinics, state-of-the-art performance centers, brain training and advanced wellness centers, and spas worldwide. A promising field-of-use is corporate wellness because multiple employees benefit from a single NanoVi device. About Eng3 Corporation Founded in 2003 by Hans Eng, Seattle-based Eng3 Corporation develops, manufactures, and distributes the NanoVi Eco, NanoVi Pro, and NanoVi Exo devices proven to improve protein function and positively influence cellular activity. NanoVi devices are used by health-conscious individuals, people who require high mental or physical performance, and those recovering from chronic illness. To inquire about purchasing a NanoVi device or find distributors please click here . About the Institute for Advance Studies and Cooperation The IASC is a non-profit interdisciplinary research foundation, that aims to develop high-level scientific activities and supports cooperation at all levels helping institutions and private organizations to develop: international relations, cross cultural projects, financial and economic progress. Emerging from the union of diverse associations and experiences, the Institute for Advanced Studies and Cooperation (IASC) is a testament to the power of unfettered research, fostering the necessary environment for groundbreaking intellectual and scientific evolution. We champion public discourse and projects of profound socio-cultural significance, bolstered by a community of thinkers committed to transcultural collaboration. Our heartfelt gratitude extends to our ‘Guardian Angels’ – the philanthropic allies whose support enables us to undertake our pioneering initiatives and projects. IASC’s dedication lies in the pursuit of knowledge and innovation across multiple domains, developing projects of strategic importance in the contemporary global scenario to amplify synergistic, interdisciplinary international cooperation. # Eng3 Corporation Announces New NanoVi Exo, Patented, Desktop Device Proven to Help Repair Everyday Cell Damage

## Enhances the body’s ability to repair cell damage caused by free radicals. Popular with health-conscious individuals, health centers, high-performers like corporate executives and professional athletes

May 09, 2019 12:45 ET| Source: [Eng3 Corporation](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/Eng3%2520Corporation)Follow Eng3 Corporation

* * *

Share

*     

*   [](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2019/05/09/1821038/0/en/Eng3-Corporation-Announces-New-NanoVi-Exo-Patented-Desktop-Device-Proven-to-Help-Repair-Everyday-Cell-Damage.html#)

*   
* * *

SEATTLE, May 09, 2019 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- [Eng3 Corporation](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=2TvBsSHYL5Y9JwyZEX4ldoDM6EueOWZmYzVSvfEP7F_ieb7ore-ZlgZDiRADm0VC1lHQR7m8TEeIp2jWzgdtPA==) today announced the availability of the newly enhanced [NanoVi Exo](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=Q8_q-BDflFwuETwJSxhz2Yuuer9mZJjb2Uvb5-LvpNz0esWO6alYQmUTuPGAod3PYqgr3lyQ5o8s_3rRq0qsH3KSZP-ydsbD7cypqUcKVCM=)™, a patented, desktop device proven to produce ordered water vapor, that improves protein function and positively influence cellular activity in as little as 15-minutes when used daily. Loss of protein function causes aging, a decline in performance and chronic illness. Accelerating cell repair strengthens the immune system, increases vitality and performance, and slows down the aging process. The company also released next generation NanoVi Eco™ and NanoVi Pro™ models.

NanoVi devices are used by [biohackers](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=F2r4NGSvG6rqlE4e3KbUgOcCKFYRFIl3Hc37V7o2goOEPumgm2eiyN6aG0QVncTHeOaY3nps9U06bnY5b_VFdoIUdwrr6gnaQMjfTXXTtA0NKog3hIIQnvU8fvGr356YbT2z_5Axz1HSUg9WpqhHNA==) and other health-conscious individuals, and people demanding high-performance like corporate executives, [professional athletes](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=vKUfqmFGMwrjwJOYUqy-4kMgD9gsOq4BhqS8fy80OcW4dCy5BlAoGdeXiTHTnfqaXwJ9IB7xc4ThcoiDIWaAm-gVUxMySYAw9-TaDisGCbTQ89Yxpi-MxgAuj-c2kdfzUCXDoH8680YLUXHCV-piNA==) (NFL, MLB, NHL, NBA), and [endurance race car drivers](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=cpWp4YLNplaRjUmSFsaHeBRaLJyzEVAXmqaaPaB9cgenFvhaCnOUdelM6kGqfIK_ggeUx7ZnZIlC67j3Aidd73kXjyO4SaceEmoCVskvkClfkmsyaaLj_5p9yLgfOi7jivoXIgU4HMQWkls8cdwq4KssWotsE5GMbd5xgTFkCGI1UG0wQtk0Jutokuvodzmj3bigrPbhrMnT5cEpL_yvJQ==). NanoVi has also been adopted by medical clinics, state-of-the-art performance centers and advanced wellness centers and spas worldwide. A promising field-of-use is corporate wellness.

“I started using NanoVi as part of my recovery protocol at the [Athletic Training Institute](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=srxVlVHrLwTOnbyXBnOmsUPBS9RlQ11DDRkgRlw12VBufIRkLpkkL2Jp91eloCsP9EMWKAOA6JhQjRvjfcZN-TeasA-BjmDOr9Or-eVeCeeje-NqhiNXewrPx-MBYlyFUfB0CqowK13DxkmI2WAdlX7OqWkxkvwYsYHwTQzjR920rkHRO_GWd1HzqK00bcLbihHq8hHokHdTSkay-_ZZ2gxoODD8diUBBAxDLiUQGMmPbZwbCwEDfi3aQjNT68822wW7ePQwU1BjNWTtPbUCRXp5myHKhSiW8hUs6TqZ7VQ=) after a bone chip removal and microfracture surgery, which I recovered from in half the time. Since then I've not been on the injured list or missed any time due to injuries. That has to do with how I train and recover, of which the NanoVi plays a huge part,” said Matt Boyd, Major League Pitcher. “The NanoVi is great for recovery and also feeling good day in and day out so you can perform at a high-level, without the general fatigue that comes with the grind of a very long season,” continued Boyd.

The body produces quadrillions of free radicals every day, and many of them damage proteins leading to a loss of function. Only intact, structured (folded) proteins work correctly. The faster proteins fold into their 3-D structures, the faster their function and cellular activity is reinstated.

Ordered cellular water (meaning the molecules are closely packed together) is essential for cellular activities because it enables proteins to fold and function. To create ordered water, the body constantly produces a specific biological signal that is absorbed by the cellular water.

NanoVi devices produce exactly the same biological signal and transfer it to water droplets that ultimately augment ordered water in the cells. The next generation NanoVi Exo devices include this bio-identical signal and add additional absorbable electromagnetic energies that are even more effective at creating ordered water. NanoVi produces these signals without introducing chemicals or substances of any kind into the body. To see an animated video of how this process works, click [here](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=Q8UN38z-keLzSMtA4UJeBd8RBPo0TDHhCyDGli3J_MAd9ewsbBoY60AYYVAXn83oJvp5eB9cusDojcggcf6MjPAwy_EolDgFQ1vni9leP04=).

"Oxidative stress is unavoidable and leads to the loss of protein function. Unfortunately, as protein damage accumulates, the body requires even more repair and there is an even higher demand for the ordered water that proteins rely on to fold. NanoVi technology was developed to support protein folding by increasing the ordered water in the cells. By assisting the body in this process, more cellular damage is repaired faster. Studies show that damage can be reversed with as little as one session using out NanoVi device, although regular use is the way to go,” said Hans Eng, Eng3 Corporation founder and CEO.

Controlled studies also show that athletes who did a NanoVi session before an intense workout accumulated an average of 17% less blood lactate. When another session followed the exertion test, indicators of immune response improved by 10-17%. Using NanoVi, athletes report that they can push harder, suffer less fatigue, focus better, and recover faster.

“I’ve been using NanoVi twice per day to supplement my off-season training routine. Since using NanoVi I wake up earlier and feel more fresh and more energized compared to previous off seasons. I look forward to bringing it to summer training camp as I prepare for the upcoming season. NanoVi makes recovery faster and it is simple and convenient to use,” said Jordan Willis, NFL Defensive End.

To purchase a NanoVi device/find distributors, or to learn more about product specs, pricing and features please click [here](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=Ip6_UP7lhQKtOENFx-RAcQFhE7JKGPpwZr5xO27icgoZexmDQIpofIL_oYlw2dzB40dukdrteil7IFigREojPg==).

**About Eng3 Corporation**

Founded in 2003, Seattle-based [Eng3 Corporation](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=2TvBsSHYL5Y9JwyZEX4ldtxcne7qDHK0nYMqsLvrKAf5goXgo7Go4yomasI_ClySX_e_DoHiNi5roUdrT5W84A==) develops, manufactures, and distributes the NanoVi Eco™, NanoVi Pro™, and NanoVi Exo™ devices proven to produce ordered water vapor, improve protein function and positively influence cellular activity. The Summit is organized by the Institute for Advance Studies and Cooperation, whose mission is to foster groundbreaking intellectual and scientific exploration. He has a remarkable ability to bring people together, and I am grateful for the invitation to present NanoVi at the Pontifical Academy of Sciences in the Vatican City.”. Rowena Gates will discuss how it is possible to help the body repair and perform better with the NanoVi device. She will introduce academic studies supporting the improvements in physical and cognitive performance and recovery from use of the NanoVi device. Dr. Gabriele Andreoli invited a presentation on NanoVi because it supports the whole system and is complementary to other health interventions. He included NanoVi in his book “Evolutionary Biohacking, the Rise of Regenerative A.I. Science,” which will be presented for the first time at the World Changers Summit. Dr. Andreoli explains why NanoVi fits so well with his agenda for sustainable health: “Proteins are the foundation of life, so having a technology that helps them work better is in full alignment with my vision for the future of health. NanoVi devices are used by biohackers and other health-conscious individuals, and people demanding high-performance including corporate executives and professional athletes (NFL, MLB, NHL, NBA). Founded in 2003 by Hans Eng, Seattle-based Eng3 Corporation develops, manufactures, and distributes the NanoVi Eco, NanoVi Pro, and NanoVi Exo devices proven to improve protein function and positively influence cellular activity. NanoVi devices are used by health-conscious individuals, people who require high mental or physical performance, and those recovering from chronic illness. The IASC is a non-profit interdisciplinary research foundation, that aims to develop high-level scientific activities and supports cooperation at all levels helping institutions and private organizations to develop: international relations, cross cultural projects, financial and economic progress. Emerging from the union of diverse associations and experiences, the Institute for Advanced Studies and Cooperation (IASC) is a testament to the power of unfettered research, fostering the necessary environment for groundbreaking intellectual and scientific evolution.

# **Eng3 to Present at World Changers Summit**

Share

* * *

**Vatican Event at Pontifical Academy of Science Focused on Creation of a Better, Healthier and more Sustainable World**

SEATTLE--([BUSINESS WIRE](https://www.businesswire.com/))--[Eng3 Corporation](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Feng3corp.com%2F&esheet=53438520&newsitemid=20230630667619&lan=en-US&anchor=Eng3+Corporation&index=1&md5=3f2578d417c2442a6756ddaed0d1272b) today announced that, Dr. Rowena Gates, co-founder and Vice President, will present NanoVi® technology at the prestigious World Changers Summit 2023 being held July 5 th at the Pontifical Academy of Sciences in the Vatican City. The Summit is organized by the Institute for Advance Studies and Cooperation, whose mission is to foster groundbreaking intellectual and scientific exploration. Speakers and guests from many countries were invited by Dr. Gabriele Andreoli, IASC President, who organized and curated the event. Dustin Plantholt, “The Count of Monte Crypto” and World Changers Summit Board Member, will act as Master of Ceremonies.

The [World Changers Summit](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwcsiasc.org%2F&esheet=53438520&newsitemid=20230630667619&lan=en-US&anchor=World+Changers+Summit&index=2&md5=34a60357b530d19a82845864834166b3) brings thought leaders in multiple disciplines together to share wisdom on how to move towards a healthier, more sustainable world. Speakers will present topics as diverse and interrelated as Artificial Intelligence, Evolutionary Biohacking, Decentralized Finance, Investment, the Metaverse, and Entrepreneurship.

Rowena Gates, who started research into alliances as a business strategy in the 1980s, is inspired by the collaborative focus of the summit. “It is an honor to be invited to speak at the World Changers Summit. Dr. Gabriele Andreoli’s vision for cooperation mirrors my approach. He has a remarkable ability to bring people together, and I am grateful for the invitation to present NanoVi at the Pontifical Academy of Sciences in the Vatican City.”

Rowena Gates will discuss how it is possible to help the body repair and perform better with the NanoVi device. This technology was embraced by the summit organizers because it fundamentally supports the body without overriding or disrupting its natural functions. She will introduce academic studies supporting the improvements in physical and cognitive performance and recovery from use of the NanoVi device.

Dr. Gabriele Andreoli invited a presentation on NanoVi because it supports the whole system and is complementary to other health interventions. He included NanoVi in his book “Evolutionary Biohacking, the Rise of Regenerative A.I. Science,” which will be presented for the first time at the World Changers Summit. Dr. Andreoli explains why NanoVi fits so well with his agenda for sustainable health: “Proteins are the foundation of life, so having a technology that helps them work better is in full alignment with my vision for the future of health. Long-term sustainable health requires that we support the body without the potential for harm.”

The NanoVi is a patented, desktop device proven to help restore the function of damaged proteins by influencing the water that surrounds them. Loss of protein function causes aging, a decline in performance and chronic illness. Accelerating cell repair strengthens the immune system, increases vitality and performance, and slows the aging process. To see an animated video of how NanoVi technology works, click [here](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Feng3corp.com%2Fintroduction-to-the-nanovi%2F&esheet=53438520&newsitemid=20230630667619&lan=en-US&anchor=here&index=3&md5=420ddfeaac255165afcea968f094da79).

NanoVi devices are used by [biohackers](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Feng3corp.com%2Fabout%2Fblog%2Fdave-asprey-nanovi-bulletproof-radio%2F&esheet=53438520&newsitemid=20230630667619&lan=en-US&anchor=biohackers&index=4&md5=c308a5b0cdadab6ec32dc214ec2334d0) and other health-conscious individuals, and people demanding high-performance including corporate executives and [professional athletes](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Feng3corp.com%2Fnanovi-for-athletes%2F&esheet=53438520&newsitemid=20230630667619&lan=en-US&anchor=professional+athletes&index=5&md5=c440ef0e2af9bda970b10f55b276f5aa) (NFL, MLB, NHL, NBA). NanoVi has also been adopted by medical clinics, state-of-the-art performance centers, brain training and advanced wellness centers, and spas worldwide. A promising field-of-use is corporate wellness because multiple employees benefit from a single NanoVi device.

**About Eng3 Corporation**

Founded in 2003 by Hans Eng, Seattle-based [Eng3 Corporation](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Feng3corp.com%2F&esheet=53438520&newsitemid=20230630667619&lan=en-US&anchor=Eng3+Corporation&index=6&md5=c1b2665f05934c807280dc3b938a2f22) develops, manufactures, and distributes the NanoVi Eco, NanoVi Pro, and NanoVi Exo devices proven to improve protein function and positively influence cellular activity. NanoVi devices are used by health-conscious individuals, people who require high mental or physical performance, and those recovering from chronic illness. To inquire about purchasing a NanoVi device or find distributors please click [here](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Feng3corp.com%2Fhow-to-purchase%2F&esheet=53438520&newsitemid=20230630667619&lan=en-US&anchor=here&index=7&md5=2862bd6dea7cec4da751cfdd61391bf1).

**About the Institute for Advance Studies and Cooperation**

The IASC is a non-profit interdisciplinary research foundation, that aims to develop high-level scientific activities and supports cooperation at all levels helping institutions and private organizations to develop: international relations, cross cultural projects, financial and economic progress.

Emerging from the union of diverse associations and experiences, the Institute for Advanced Studies and Cooperation (IASC) is a testament to the power of unfettered research, fostering the necessary environment for groundbreaking intellectual and scientific evolution. We champion public discourse and projects of profound socio-cultural significance, bolstered by a community of thinkers committed to transcultural collaboration. Our heartfelt gratitude extends to our ‘Guardian Angels’ – the philanthropic allies whose support enables us to undertake our pioneering initiatives and projects. IASC’s dedication lies in the pursuit of knowledge and innovation across multiple domains, developing projects of strategic importance in the contemporary global scenario to amplify synergistic, interdisciplinary international cooperation. We hold ourselves to a standard of absolute independence on all projects, working alongside our partners. For further information:

# The Story Behind

## About Eng3 Corporation

Founded in 2003 by engineer Hans Eng, Eng3 Corporation creates scientifically validated technology specifically designed to promote cellular activities and improve protein functions through the repair and protection of protein structures.   
  
 Eng3 is the first medical device company to address the problem of oxidative stress and cell damage by focusing on protein structure and folding—both how to repair damage when it happens, and how to prevent or slow it. Its NanoVi family of devices—NanoVi Eco®, NanoVi Pro®, and NanoVi Exo®—were designed to use biophysics, not chemical substances, to provoke the body’s natural repair processes.

## Our Mission to the Health Community

Our mission is to leverage recent advances in biophysics and water science to improve the health and wellbeing of people all over the world.   
  
 We believe that it is better to help the body repair itself than to override its natural processes with substances or pharmaceuticals.

## Meet Our Leaders

## Hans Eng

Founder and CEO

Originally hailing from Berlin, Germany, Hans Eng is the founder and chief executive officer of Eng3 Corporation. He formed the company several years after moving to the United States.   
  
 An engineer by training, Hans has an extensive background in research and development, production, and quality assurance for medical devices. Hans’ 25+ years of experience with advanced medical technologies includes a stint at Johnson & Johnson in Europe and the formation, growth, and successful sale of a German medical implant company.   
  
 Hans leveraged his degree from the Technical University of Berlin and his background in material sciences and proteomics in the development of the proprietary technology underlying Eng3’s NanoVi® products, which reflect not only his expertise in medical technologies but also his passion for health and athletic performance. When he finds some spare time, Hans heads for the great outdoors for hiking, snowboarding, or snowshoeing.

## Rowena Gates

VP Business Development

A native of Vancouver, Canada, Rowena Gates is a principal and the vice president of business development at Eng3 Corporation. She has worked with the company for more than 15 years, building relationships with clients in the health, wellness, and performance markets.

Like Hans, Rowena is a serial entrepreneur. Prior to joining Eng3, Rowena spent six years as founder and CEO of Aviarc Corporation, a leader in document chain management. Before Aviarc, she co-founded a document imaging company, now part of ImageSource. And prior to that, in 1995, she co-founded one of the earliest companies to offer an Internet-based solution to the logistics industry.

Rowena received a Doctorate from the University of Washington for her dissertation on the use of international strategic alliances by emerging high-tech companies. When she’s able to take time away from Eng3, she enjoys tennis, sailing, backpacking, and hiking or snowshoeing in the mountains near Seattle.

## Start Reversing Cellular Damage

I am a healthcare professional and consent to the use of cookies Endorse Company&body=Dear HealthManagement.org Team,%0D%0A%0D%0Awe would like to find out on how to endorse our company.%0D%0A%0D%0A(Please add your contact details in between << >>)%0D%0A%0D%0AFull Name: << >>%0D%0AJob Title: << >>%0D%0ACompany to be endorsed: << >>%0D%0AKey Products: << >>%0D%0AContact Phone: << >>%0D%0AEmail: << >>%0D%0A%0D%0ABest regards, "Click to fully disclose your companies products and services") We work with international distribution partners to make NanoVi™ products available in foreign markets. NanoVi™ devices represent a new era of bio-identical signaling technology for stimulating oxidative response. Since 2003 Eng3 has been selling products referred to as activated air devices that also address oxidative stress damage. The new NanoVi™ products were announced in late 2010, replacing previous activated air devices. Instead of overriding natural functions by introducing a substance, NanoVi™ devices are designed to stimulate the body’s own oxidative response, which protects against and repairs oxidative stress damage. Through years of scientific research, the mechanisms for signaling technology have been discovered and the importance of these mechanisms verified. Previous activated air technologies, including Active Air (or ActiveAir), Airnergy and their predecessor Valkion, used a catalyst designed to produce a reactive oxygen species (ROS). The ROS then emitted a specific signal to ultimately initiate a biological response. Unlike the Valkion, Airnergy or Active Air devices, Eng3’s new technology relies on the direct creation and control of the ROS-specific signal. For the NanoVi™ device, it is possible to quantify the emission levels and the exact type of the ROS-specific signals. A leading research University tested the NanoVi™ technology and verified that the desired type, quantity and quality of the emitted signal are exactly what is produced. Eng3’s team of German, American and Canadian engineers designed and developed the intellectual property and its technological realization for the NanoVi™ devices. Most of the manufacturing, including final assembly, takes place in Seattle, a leading center for Life Science and Bio-Medical Technology in the U.S. Header (h1) -->Staff at Eng3 are supportive and responsive to all the things necessary to inform potential customer so they make more informed decisions.

We work with international distribution partners to make NanoVi™ products available in foreign markets. NanoVi™ devices represent a new era of bio-identical signaling technology for stimulating oxidative response. Since 2003 Eng3 has been selling products referred to as activated air devices that also address oxidative stress damage. The new NanoVi™ products were announced in late 2010, replacing previous activated air devices. Technical Focus Our approach is to improve cellular activities without pharmaceuticals. Instead of overriding natural functions by introducing a substance, NanoVi™ devices are designed to stimulate the body’s own oxidative response, which protects against and repairs oxidative stress damage.

Eng3 worked with Indiana University School of Medicine – Terre Haute to develop the scientific foundation for the technology. Through years of scientific research, the mechanisms for signaling technology have been discovered and the importance of these mechanisms verified. Previous activated air technologies, including Active Air (or ActiveAir), Airnergy and their predecessor Valkion, used a catalyst designed to produce a reactive oxygen species (ROS). The ROS then emitted a specific signal to ultimately initiate a biological response. With this approach, it was not possible to verify what was emitted or how much was produced. Unlike the Valkion, Airnergy or Active Air devices, Eng3’s new technology relies on the direct creation and control of the ROS-specific signal. With our approach, the signal can be measured. This precision allows Eng3 to move from a conceptual explanation to a measurable output. For the NanoVi™ device, it is possible to quantify the emission levels and the exact type of the ROS-specific signals. A leading research University tested the NanoVi™ technology and verified that the desired type, quantity and quality of the emitted signal are exactly what is produced. Product Innovation Relying on customer-focused design, Eng3 made significant advances in usability.

A touch screen user interface is precise, intuitive and easy to operate. Another improvement in usability is a completely new way to connect the easy–to-clean water container. It slides in or out of the device, without any tricky connections. A permanently connected High-Performance tubing reduces the length of the nasal cannula and therefore improves the signal delivery. An integrated smart card reader allows highly efficient access control in professional environments. Eng3’s team of German, American and Canadian engineers designed and developed the intellectual property and its technological realization for the NanoVi™ devices. Most of the manufacturing, including final assembly, takes place in Seattle, a leading center for Life Science and Bio-Medical Technology in the U.S. Header (h1) -->Staff at Eng3 are supportive and responsive to all the things necessary to inform potential customer so they make more informed decisions. RB, Illinois

results.title: Eng3 Corporation Announces New Medical/Wellness Device
results.content: Get the latest industry news and expert insights delivered straight to your inbox! # Eng3 Corporation Announces New Medical/Wellness Device. Eng3 Corporation, announces its new NanoVi™ and NanoVi Pro™ devices. This innovative technology is used to improve the body's cellular activities. A user inhales air from the device during sessions that typically last between 20 and 40 minutes. NanoVi™ ( ) devices are used to combat chronic or age-related diseases associated with free radical damage. The devices are ideal for wellness and anti-aging because they support cellular regeneration. NanoVi technology is also one of the most advanced ways for athletes to optimize performance. What makes this technology exceptional, according to CEO Hans Eng, is that it triggers a biological process without introducing drugs or anything unnatural into the system. He explains, "Metabolizing oxygen creates free radicals that accumulate to cause oxidative stress. The body's natural oxidative response continually prevents and repairs oxidative stress damage. When the response mechanisms cannot keep up, it results in accelerated aging or age-related diseases. NanoVi™ technology mimics a specific aspect of free radicals that acts as a trigger for the body's natural oxidative response.". Cleared as a Class I or over-the-counter device, Eng3's products are used in professional settings and by people in their homes. The NanoVi ( ) Pro™ device is well suited to health, wellness, fitness or assisted living centers of all types because it complements the services they already offer. Sessions can be done independently or in conjunction with other treatments or activities. "Our goal is to have devices in as many centers as possible in order to maximize the access people have to the technology," notes Eng. Eng3 Corporation, a privately held company, has been working in the medical device field since 2003. The company designs and manufactures NanoVi™ and NanoVi Pro™ devices in Seattle Washington. U.S., German and Canadian engineers, developed this proprietary technology over the last three and a half years. Eng3 will introduce its new device at MEDICA 2010 in Düsseldorf Germany. MEDICA is the largest exhibition for the health care industry, attracting more than 135,000 visitors each year. ### Newsletter Signup.

# Eng3 Corporation Announces New Medical/Wellness Device

Eng3 Corporation, announces its new NanoVi™ and NanoVi Pro™ devices. This innovative technology is used to improve the body's cellular activities. A user inhales air from the device during sessions that typically last between 20 and 40 minutes. NanoVi™ (http://www.eng3corp.com ) devices are used to combat chronic or age-related diseases associated with free radical damage. The devices are ideal for wellness and anti-aging because they support cellular regeneration. NanoVi technology is also one of the most advanced ways for athletes to optimize performance.

What makes this technology exceptional, according to CEO Hans Eng, is that it triggers a biological process without introducing drugs or anything unnatural into the system. He explains, "Metabolizing oxygen creates free radicals that accumulate to cause oxidative stress. The body's natural oxidative response continually prevents and repairs oxidative stress damage. When the response mechanisms cannot keep up, it results in accelerated aging or age-related diseases. NanoVi™ technology mimics a specific aspect of free radicals that acts as a trigger for the body's natural oxidative response."

Cleared as a Class I or over-the-counter device, Eng3's products are used in professional settings and by people in their homes. The NanoVi (http://www.eng3corp.com ) Pro™ device is well suited to health, wellness, fitness or assisted living centers of all types because it complements the services they already offer. Sessions can be done independently or in conjunction with other treatments or activities. "Our goal is to have devices in as many centers as possible in order to maximize the access people have to the technology," notes Eng.

Eng3 Corporation, a privately held company, has been working in the medical device field since 2003. The company designs and manufactures NanoVi™ and NanoVi Pro™ devices in Seattle Washington. U.S., German and Canadian engineers, developed this proprietary technology over the last three and a half years. Eng3 will introduce its new device at MEDICA 2010 in Düsseldorf Germany. MEDICA is the largest exhibition for the health care industry, attracting more than 135,000 visitors each year.

# Eng3 NanoVi Therapy Program

## NanoVi for Health and Wellness

There are many benefits to NanoVi technology such as improving the body’s response to oxidative stress damage, leading to to better health and vitality for people of all ages. Also referred to as Eng3 NanoVi, after the company that created the technology, additional benefits include a stronger immune response and ability to deal with stress by helping repair cells. While the procedure can’t prevent cellular damage caused by wear and tear, it helps repair cells.

#### Health Benefits of NanoVi™

* Protection against, and repair of, free radical damage
* Counteracts the adverse effects of aging
* Improves immune system function
* Enhances utilization of oxygen and nutrients
* Increases efficiency of cellular activities such as energy production and detoxification
* Reduction of double strand DNA breaks
* Less lactate in the blood after exertion
* Stronger stress response measured by Heart Rate Variability

#### How Does NanoVi™ Technology Work?

The NanoVi™ device augments a signal naturally generated by the body that is essential to cellular activity. The following 3D animation explains how NanoVi’s “bio-identical signal” assists the multi-step process of reinstalling essential protein functions in the cells. Here are three illustrations to explain how NanoVi™ technology helps repair cell damage and free radicals. In each scenario, the free radicals or “bad ROS” are illustrated in red. The “good ROS” signals are illustrated in green.   
   
 In the first scenario, we see free radicals in red (the “bad ROS”) attacking a cell and causing cell damage to proteins, mitochondria, DNA and the cell membrane. Also notice the green ROS signal, the body’s natural way of triggering repair. Once these “good ROS” emit their signal, they join the ranks of the “bad ROS”.

#### Scenario One

Here we show a great deal of free radical damage and assume little or no protection from supplementary antioxidants. This illustration shows no outside support for the body to recover from free radical damage.

#### Scenario Two

In the second scenario, we show a better-looking, or healthier cell. Here we assume the person is taking some preventive measures, primarily by supplementing with antioxidants in foods. Still, the “good ROS” signal for repair remains the same.

#### Scenario Three

In the third scenario, we show the best-looking cell. This body is benefiting from antioxidants and, by adding the NanoVi™ which works to signal, is augmenting the body’s natural ability to repair cell damage and free radicals.

#### Does NanoVi Work for Athletes?

NanoVi technology works to counteract the effects of bad reactive oxygen species by improving the good effects. Detroit Tigers pitcher Matt Boyd and his All-Star colleague Miguel Cabrera, are fans of NanoVi . The device has also drawn praise from biohackers, race car drivers and competitive cyclists. (GeekWire). Performance athletes experience a demanding cycle of oxidative stress damage and repair and therefore they must repair oxidative stress damage quickly to stay healthy and perform well.

#### How does NanoVi make a signal that is bio-identical to what our bodies make?

We create an electromagnetic signal that has precisely the same wavelength as the ‘good ROS’ (excited) produces in our cells. We were not the ones to figure out how important this wavelength is in initiating cellular repair. That work was done by cell biologists, specifically, scientists studying REDOX signaling.   
   
 Our innovation is to generate the precise and measurable signal inside the NanoVi™ device, without producing any ROS. The signal is transferred to humidity (absorbed) and the effect is delivered across humidified air. Avoiding the production of any kind of reactive oxygen species is a key aspect of NanoVi technology. University\* research proves it produces precisely the correct signal. Researchers have conducted a number of studies, including placebo-controlled research. The results are available in our Library.

#### Begin your Recovery Today

If you are ready to take the step towards a new life, call Defining Wellness today and learn more about how we can help you.
